rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0010
rows.name:
To think the facilities are
operational to this extent[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0020
rows.name:
I know I was absent for a while, but
it hasn't exactly been years, has it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0030
rows.name: Honestly, I'm impressed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0040
rows.name: I'm starting to like NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0050
rows.name: Good.[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0060
rows.name: Come on, cheer up already, Princess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0070
rows.name: I have no idea what you're talking about.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0080
rows.name: Why would I be in a bad mood?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0090
rows.name: Well, I left you all alone for a long time[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0100
rows.name: I figured you might be angry with me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0110
rows.name: [ST:wide ]―Let's see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0120
rows.name: If only you had stayed behind with me,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0130
rows.name: I might have had a slightly easier time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0140
rows.name:
When the Air Force assigned you
to us with such strong backing,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0150
rows.name:
your talent for piloting
Dolls was truly exceptional.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0160
rows.name:
Naturally, it did not take long
before you were offered a promotion[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0170
rows.name:
Even though it meant you
leaving the team so soon,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0190
rows.name: I was genuinely happy for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0200
rows.name: [ST:wide ]―If there is anything I am angry about,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0210
rows.name:
it might be at myself for
entrusting the Ares to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0220
rows.name: When we escaped Earth[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0230
rows.name: I prioritized commanding the team,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0240
rows.name:
and I did not stop you when you took
the Ares on your own authority,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0250
rows.name: charging into the fray entirely by yourself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0260
rows.name: It was irresponsible of me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0270
rows.name: I ended up clinging to your strength.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0280
rows.name: You came to be called a hero,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0290
rows.name: became the exclusive pilot of the Ares,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0300
rows.name:
and continued protecting the
White Whale from then on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0310
rows.name:
And in the battle that led to
our crash-landing on Mira,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0320
rows.name: you[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0330
rows.name: I regretted it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0340
rows.name: Forcing the Ares onto you,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0350
rows.name: and compelling you to fight as a hero...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0360
rows.name: I couldn't forgive myself for that.[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0370
rows.name: It wasn't your fault.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0380
rows.name: I just rushed off on my own.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0390
rows.name:
I was just acting tough, borrowing
the Ares's power like a kid.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0400
rows.name: I'm no hero[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0410
rows.name: I was just scared.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0420
rows.name: Just like when I lost my homeland as a child,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0425
rows.name:
I was terrified of losing my
place in the world again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0430
rows.name: I wanted to protect the White Whale[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0440
rows.name: The Ares was just dragged along with me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0450
rows.name: Dragged along, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0460
rows.name: But...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0470
rows.name: If that's the case, I'm the same.[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0480
rows.name: I lost the planet where I was born,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0485
rows.name: and dragged the Ares along with me to Earth[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0490
rows.name: But you know[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0500
rows.name:
That underestimates the
Ares's power too much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0510
rows.name: The Ares wasn't dragged along.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0520
rows.name: This Doll is always guiding us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0530
rows.name: Guiding us[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0540
rows.name: To where we belong.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0550
rows.name: Where we[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0560
rows.name: Belong[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0570
rows.name: Yes.[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0580
rows.name: [ST:wide ]―I'm glad...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31140100_MSG0590
rows.name: that you came back.[ST:wait ]
